nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Defines C# coding style conventions for the ECC plugin, covering naming standards, type usage, immutability with records, async/error handling patterns, and formatting rules enforced across C# codebases.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Specifies ECC hook configurations for C# projects, describing PostToolUse hooks for format-on-save and Stop hooks for running tests after each session.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Documents canonical C# design patterns for the ECC plugin context, including the API response wrapper pattern, repository pattern, options pattern for configuration, and dependency injection registration conventions.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Establishes C# security rules covering secret management via environment variables, parameterized SQL to prevent injection, input validation, ASP.NET Core authentication/authorization setup, and safe error handling to avoid information leakage.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Defines C# testing standards using xUnit as the required framework, specifying test organization with the Arrange-Act-Assert pattern, ASP.NET Core integration test setup with WebApplicationFactory, and coverage requirements.
